page.title: Marbella Yacht Charter Dietary Restrictions: Catering for All Needs

data.meta_description: Plan your Marbella yacht charter with confidence. We cater for dietary restrictions including gluten-free, vegan, halal, and allergies. Confirm needs 48h prior.
data.summary: Learn how Marbella yacht charter dietary restrictions are handled on our fleet. From gluten-free to halal, we can accommodate most dietary needs with 48-hour notice.
key_facts: Dietary restrictions must be confirmed at least 48 hours before departure.
Standard inclusions: water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks.
Gluten-free, vegan, vegetarian, halal, and kosher options available on request.
Allergies (nuts, shellfish, dairy) can be accommodated with advance notice.
Catering upgrades available for an extra fee – inquire via WhatsApp.
Our licensed skipper can recommend local catering partners in Marbella.
All charters include Spanish IVA (21%) and insurance.

faq.q: Can you accommodate gluten-free diets on a Marbella yacht charter?
faq.a: Yes, we can arrange gluten-free snacks and meals for your charter. Please inform us at least 48 hours in advance so we can coordinate with our catering partners. Standard inclusions like drinks and snacks can be substituted with gluten-free alternatives.

faq.q: Do you offer vegan or vegetarian options on board?
faq.a: Absolutely. We can provide vegan and vegetarian light snacks, salads, and main courses. Just let us know your preferences when booking. Our standard inclusions of soft drinks, water, and cava are already plant-based.

faq.q: Is halal food available on your yacht charters in Marbella?
faq.a: Halal options can be arranged with 48-hour notice. We work with local suppliers in Puerto Banús to source halal-certified snacks and meals. Please specify your requirements during the booking process.

faq.q: Can you cater for kosher dietary restrictions?
faq.a: Kosher catering can be organised upon request, though it requires at least 72 hours' notice due to sourcing requirements. We'll liaise with Marbella's kosher-certified providers to ensure compliance.

faq.q: What happens if I have a severe food allergy?
faq.a: We take allergies seriously. Please inform us of any allergies (e.g., nuts, shellfish, dairy) when booking. Our team will ensure allergen-free options and brief the skipper. Emergency procedures are in place, but we recommend bringing your own EpiPen if required.

faq.q: Can I bring my own food on board?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food. However, our standard inclusions already cover snacks and drinks. If you have specific dietary needs, we recommend confirming catering with us to avoid inconvenience.

faq.q: Is there an extra charge for dietary-specific catering?
faq.a: Standard dietary adjustments (e.g., substituting snacks) are free. For full meal upgrades or specialised menus (e.g., kosher, halal platters), there may be an additional fee. Contact us via WhatsApp for a quote.

faq.q: How do I inform you about dietary restrictions?
faq.a: Simply mention your dietary needs when booking via our website or WhatsApp. We'll confirm details 48 hours before departure. For last-minute bookings, we'll do our best but cannot guarantee all options.

data.body_html:
When booking a Marbella yacht charter dietary restrictions are straightforward to manage on our fleet. Whether you need gluten-free snacks, vegan meals, halal provisions, or allergy-safe options, we can accommodate most needs with 48 hours' notice. All our charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and a standard selection of drinks and light snacks. For specialised menus, simply let us know when you book. Explore our full fleet on the Boat Rental Marbella homepage.

Standard inclusions on every charter

Every boat in our fleet – from the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) to the Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) – comes with the same base catering: water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. These items are included in the price, along with the skipper, fuel, insurance, and Spanish IVA (21%). If your dietary restrictions conflict with these items, we can substitute them at no extra cost. For example, we can swap beer for gluten-free alternatives or provide vegan snacks instead of the standard mix.

Common dietary needs we handle

Our catering partners in Puerto Banús and Marbella are experienced with a range of requirements:

  • Gluten-free – crackers, bread, and snacks available.
  • Vegan / vegetarian – plant-based platters, salads, and dips.
  • Halal – certified meat and snacks sourced locally.
  • Kosher – requires 72 hours' notice; we coordinate with Marbella's kosher suppliers.
  • Allergies – nut-free, dairy-free, shellfish-free options on request.

All dietary adjustments must be confirmed at least 48 hours before departure (72 hours for kosher). For last-minute bookings, we'll do our best but cannot guarantee every option.

Catering upgrades and full meals

If you want more than light snacks – a full lunch, barbecue, or gourmet menu – we can arrange catering upgrades for an additional fee. Contact us via WhatsApp for a quote. Our team works with local chefs and caterers who can tailor menus to your dietary restrictions. Upgrades are popular on longer charters like the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) or the Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax), where clients often spend 6–8 hours cruising from Puerto Banús to Cabopino or Estepona.

What about drinks?

Our standard drinks package includes water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava. If you require non-alcoholic alternatives, sugar-free options, or specific brands, just let us know. For halal or religious restrictions, we can remove alcohol entirely. All drinks are served on board by your skipper. If you prefer to bring your own beverages, you're welcome to do so.

Bringing your own food

You are free to bring your own food and drinks on any charter. However, we recommend confirming your dietary needs with us first. Our standard inclusions already cover snacks and drinks, so you may not need extra supplies. If you have severe allergies, bringing your own safe options is a good backup. Remember that our boats depart from Puerto Banús, and there are supermarkets and delis nearby for last-minute shopping.

Planning your charter with dietary needs

To ensure a smooth experience, follow these steps:

  1. Book your preferred yacht – see our fleet on the Boat Rental Marbella homepage.
  2. Mention your dietary restrictions in the booking form or via WhatsApp.
  3. Confirm details at least 48 hours before departure.
  4. Enjoy your day on the water, whether you're cruising to Cala del Faro, anchoring near the Golden Mile, or exploring Sotogrande.

Our team is used to handling diverse requirements, from gluten-free to halal. We'll coordinate with local suppliers to make your charter stress-free.

Frequently asked questions

Can you accommodate gluten-free diets on a Marbella yacht charter?

Yes, we can arrange gluten-free snacks and meals for your charter. Please inform us at least 48 hours in advance so we can coordinate with our catering partners. Standard inclusions like drinks and snacks can be substituted with gluten-free alternatives.

Do you offer vegan or vegetarian options on board?

Absolutely. We can provide vegan and vegetarian light snacks, salads, and main courses. Just let us know your preferences when booking. Our standard inclusions of soft drinks, water, and cava are already plant-based.

Is halal food available on your yacht charters in Marbella?

Halal options can be arranged with 48-hour notice. We work with local suppliers in Puerto Banús to source halal-certified snacks and meals. Please specify your requirements during the booking process.

Can you cater for kosher dietary restrictions?

Kosher catering can be organised upon request, though it requires at least 72 hours' notice due to sourcing requirements. We'll liaise with Marbella's kosher-certified providers to ensure compliance.

What happens if I have a severe food allergy?

We take allergies seriously. Please inform us of any allergies (e.g., nuts, shellfish, dairy) when booking. Our team will ensure allergen-free options and brief the skipper. Emergency procedures are in place, but we recommend bringing your own EpiPen if required.

Can I bring my own food on board?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food. However, our standard inclusions already cover snacks and drinks. If you have specific dietary needs, we recommend confirming catering with us to avoid inconvenience.

Is there an extra charge for dietary-specific catering?

Standard dietary adjustments (e.g., substituting snacks) are free. For full meal upgrades or specialised menus (e.g., kosher, halal platters), there may be an additional fee. Contact us via WhatsApp for a quote.

How do I inform you about dietary restrictions?

Simply mention your dietary needs when booking via our website or WhatsApp. We'll confirm details 48 hours before departure. For last-minute bookings, we'll do our best but cannot guarantee all options.

Ready to book your Marbella yacht charter? Browse our fleet and let us know your dietary needs. Visit the Boat Rental Marbella homepage to get started.
